## Summary / 摘要

- Task/Issue / 任务或 Issue:
- Motivation / 变更动机:
- Scope / 变更范围:

## Validation / 验证

- [ ] lint
- [ ] unit tests
- [ ] integration tests (if affected) / 集成测试（受影响时）
- [ ] build

## Contract and Compatibility / 契约与兼容性

- [ ] API/SSE/Event/Error contract impact assessed / 已评估 API/SSE/事件/错误码影响
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/00-11`, `docs/12`, `docs/15`, `docs/16`, `docs/17` as needed) / 文档已同步更新
- [ ] Backward compatibility preserved or migration plan attached / 保持向后兼容或附迁移方案
- [ ] Implementation strictly follows design docs; doc errors (if any) corrected and explained / 实现严格遵循设计文档，文档错误已修正并说明

## Internationalization / 国际化

- [ ] New UI/API messages include i18n keys and locale fallback / 新增文案已提供 i18n key 与回退策略
- [ ] `zh-CN` and `en` outputs validated for affected paths / 受影响路径已验证中英文输出

## Risk and Rollback / 风险与回滚

- Risk / 风险:
- Rollback plan / 回滚方案:

## Progress Sync / 进度同步

- [ ] `docs/14-development-progress.md` updated
